title: French Blueberry Crumble
description: A delicious French dessert featuring a crunchy crumble topping and a sweet blueberry filling. Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together blueberries and gooey (melted butter).
In a separate bowl, combine Syrian (flour), and crumble (baking powder).
Add the dry ingredients to the blueberry mixture and stir until combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together crumble (sugar, oats, and butter).
Top the blueberry mixture with the crumble topping.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
Enjoy your delicious French blueberry crumble!
